Hero.title: Show your skills — and see the whole path to an offer.
Hero.titleAccent: the whole path to an offer
Hero.body: Like a company? Take a short test right away. No résumé, no week of silence wondering whether anyone even looked.

How.title: Three steps, no black box
How.step1Body: See the salary range and the whole path to an offer upfront.
How.step2Body: A standardized task — a neutral skill check, not a piece of the company's real work.
How.step3Body: Every stage is lit up. No waiting in the dark.

Demo.step1Sub: 32 m² studio layout · not a real project

Waitlist.title: Want to hire this way — or interview this way?
